## 📋 Summary

_A brief one- or two-sentence overview of your idea or perspective._

## 🎯 Motivation

_Why is this important? What problem or opportunity does it address?_

## 💡 Proposal

_Describe your idea in more detail. How do you envision it working or evolving?_

- **Key points**:
  1. …
  2. …
  3. …

## 🤔 Alternatives Considered

_Have you thought about other approaches? What led you to this one?_

## 📈 Impact

_What might change if this were adopted? (e.g., benefits, trade-offs, risks)_

## 🗓️ Timeline / Next Steps

_If relevant, outline any steps, milestones, or deadlines you have in mind._
